title: Pretty Scary Horrors
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/Ru0oOJJI1NQ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe><iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/UCy76_zBaM0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>Pretty Scary Horrors is a modpack where horror takes center stage.
Even though it may only have three horror mods, don’t be fooled — these mods can wreak absolute havoc on your game, creating an unpredictable and terrifying atmosphere.
And that’s just the beginning… future updates will bring even more bizarre and spine-chilling content!
